message:
test(web): Add unit tests for cn utility and useIsMobile hooks

- Add comprehensive tests for cn() utility function in lib/utils.test.ts
- Add tests for useIsMobile and useIsSmallScreen hooks
- Tests cover viewport detection, resize handling, and cleanup
- All 60 tests pass (11 for utils, 11 for hooks)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
